title: Implement Hello World CLI in Go

steps.description:
Implement the full feature in main.go — single-binary go project

Feature requirements: build a hello world CLI in Go that prints Hello, hex!
steps.done_condition: main.go compiles and fully implements: build a hello world CLI in Go that prints Hello, hex!; go.mod has correct dependencies

riskRegister.mitigation: Consider refactoring as the application grows.

successCriteria: Running `hello` prints 'Hello, hex!' to standard output.
